head.hi: The Right Reverend Alfred Harding, Protestant Episcopal Bishop of Washington, to President Harding

opener.dateline: Portland, Oreg., September 22, 1922.Received at the Department of State from the White House Sept. 29.

div.p: May I advise you that the Committee of the Episcopal Church to Cooperate with the Near East Relief has been instructed by the unanimous vote of the House of Bishops and House of Deputies to create a public sentiment which will support our President and Secretary of State in any effort, diplomatic, naval, or military, that they may make toward the establishment of justice, mercy, and peace in the stricken lands of the Near East.
